subcodes.first_line: O ye two brothers, two embodiments, praise be to God that ye have traversed mountains and hills, plains and wilderness, and crossed the seas [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر دو پیکر حمد خدا را که جبال و تلال و دشت و صحرا و دریا را طى و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
